case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. CRAIG B. CULVER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION ON NON SERVICE OF S&C ON CRAIG B CULVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CULVER, CRAIG B. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-2010
DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-12-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-12-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
